code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples into a single fluent sentence.
    Unknown predicates fall back to a generic pattern.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Simple predicate‑to‑phrase mapping for more natural wording
    # Helper to format numbers without unnecessary trailing .0
    def _fmt_num(val: str) -> str:
        try:
            f = float(val)
            if f.is_integer():
                return str(int(f))
            return str(f)
        except ValueError:
            return val

    phrase_map = {
        "cityServed": "{s} serves the city of {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": "{s} is {o} metres above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": "{s} is {o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": "{s} is {o} metres above sea level",
        "location": "{s} is located in {o}",
        "operatingOrganisation": "{s} is operated by {o}",
        # More natural phrasing for runway length
        "runwayLength": "{s}'s runway length is {o} metres",
        "runwayLengthFeet": "{s}'s runway length is {o} feet",
        "runwayName": "{s} has runway {o}",
        # Improved phrasing for country
        "country": "{s} is in the country of {o}",
        "isPartOf": "{s} is part of {o}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": "{s} has a first runway length of {o} feet",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": "{s} has a first runway length of {o} metres",
        "1stRunwayNumber": "{s} has first runway number {o}",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": "The first runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": "The second runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": "{s} has a third runway length of {o} feet",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": "The third runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": "{s} has a fourth runway length of {o} feet",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": "The fourth runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": "{s} has fifth runway number {o}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": "The fifth runway at {s} is made of {o}",
        # ICAO/IATA phrasing aligned with reference
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": "ICAO Location Identifier of {s} is {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": "Location Identifier of {s} is {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": "IATA Location Identifier of {s} is {o}",
        "nativeName": "{s} is also known as {o}",
        "leaderParty": "{s} is governed by the {o} party",
        "capital": "{o} is the capital of {s}",
        "language": "{s} speaks {o}",
        "leader": "{o} is the leader of {s}",
        "owner": "{s} is owned by {o}",
        "largestCity": "{s} has largest city {o}",
        "mayor": "{o} is the mayor of {s}",
        "officialLanguage": "{s} has official language {o}",
        "city": "{s} is a city {o}",
        # Refined jurisdiction phrasing
        "jurisdiction": "{s} has jurisdiction in {o}",
        "demonym": "{s} residents are called {o}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": "{s} operates helicopter {o}",
        "transportAircraft": "{s} operates transport aircraft {o}",
        "currency": "{s} uses the {o}",
        "headquarter": "{s} is headquartered at {o}",
        "class": "{s} belongs to class {o}",
        "division": "{s} belongs to division {o}",
        "order": "{s} belongs to order {o}",
        "regionServed": "{s} serves the region {o}",
        "leaderTitle": "{s} has leader title {o}",
        "hubAirport": "{s} uses hub airport {o}",
        "aircraftFighter": "{s} flies fighter {o}",
        "attackAircraft": "{s} flies attack aircraft {o}",
        "battle": "{s} participated in {o}",
        "countySeat": "{s} has county seat {o}",
        "chief": "{s} is led by chief {o}",
        "foundedBy": "{s} was founded by {o}",
        "postalCode": "{s} has postal code {o}",
        "areaCode": "{s} has area code {o}",
        "foundingYear": "{s} was founded in {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": "{s} is in ceremonial county {o}",
    }

    # Helper to strip surrounding quotes from object strings
    def _clean_obj(o: str) -> str:
        if isinstance(o, str) and len(o) >= 2 and ((o[0] == '"' and o[-1] == '"') or (o[0] == "'" and o[-1] == "'")):
            return o[1:-1]
        return o

    clauses = []
    for t in triples:
        tmpl = phrase_map.get(t.predicate)
        obj_clean = _clean_obj(t.object)
        # Normalise runway surface types to lower case for natural phrasing
        if "RunwaySurfaceType" in t.predicate:
            obj_clean = obj_clean.lower()
        if tmpl:
            clause = tmpl.format(s=t.subject, o=obj_clean)
        else:
            # fallback generic wording
            clause = f"{t.subject} has {t.predicate} {obj_clean}"
        clauses.append(clause)

    # Join clauses into a single fluent sentence, using commas and an 'and' before the last clause
    if not clauses:
        return ""
    if len(clauses) == 1:
        sentence = clauses[0] + "."
    else:
        sentence = ", ".join(clauses[:-1]) + ", and " + clauses[-1] + "."
    # Capitalize first character
    return sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
